name: Example Commerce AI Writer
shortDescription: Example AI writing tool record for testing reviewed import fields before connecting live sources.
longDescription:
This sample represents a review-stage AI writing tool for product copy, SEO briefs, and store content workflows. It is intentionally fictional so local import tests can run without creating accidental public recommendations.

Use it to verify that the worker can normalize arrays, scores, categories, source URLs, SEO metadata, and editorial review fields before a real source is connected.
cons: Should never be used as an editorial recommendation
decisionSummary: Use this record only to test that worker imports reach Strapi correctly with review-ready content fields.
affiliateDisclosure: This fictional sample has no affiliate relationship and is only used for local worker import testing.
seoDescription: Example imported AI writing tool record used to test the local content worker and review-stage CMS import workflow.

name: Example Store Analytics
shortDescription: Example analytics platform record for testing import categories, scores, and source metadata.
longDescription:
This fictional analytics record tests the worker path for tools that belong to analytics and attribution workflows. It includes enough structured fields to behave like a real review-stage CMS entry without implying a real product endorsement.

Use it when checking how imported tools appear in category relationships, score displays, source lists, and SEO metadata. Before importing real analytics products, replace every sample field with verified source-backed content.
decisionSummary: Use this record to test review-stage imports for analytics tools without publishing a real recommendation.
affiliateDisclosure: This fictional sample has no affiliate relationship and should remain a local import test record.
seoDescription: Example imported analytics tool record used to test paid pricing, category relations, source URLs, and review-stage import behavior.
